node_6.subject: Latoya Williams
node_6.description: This is Latoya Williams's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, complete a photography session from 8:30 am to 11:00 am, have lunch at 12:00 pm, edit photos and work on her project from 1:00 pm to 4:00 pm, take a break and go for a walk to clear her mind from 4:00 pm to 5:00 pm, have dinner at 5:30 pm, engage in conversations with fellow artists about the upcoming mayor election from 6:30 pm to 8:00 pm.
